title: Title: "Honoring Motherhood: Mother's Day in the USA"
description: Summary: Mother's Day in the USA is a special occasion to honor and appreciate mothers for their love and sacrifices, celebrated with gifts, cards, and quality time. The holiday has a rich history dating back to the early 20th century, officially recognized as a national holiday in 1914 by President Woodrow Wilson.
